sourceTitle: Guidance for use of Generative AI tools
verificationNotes: IS&T official guidance page explicitly addressing generative AI use at MIT. Covers data privacy (FERPA, HIPAA, MA data protection), transparency/disclosure requirements for academic and research use, information protection classifications, and restrictions on high-risk data. References MIT academic integrity policies. Updated 2/19/2025. Primary focus is IT/security-level guidance but contains substantive AI-specific policy direction.
